description: This Java class defines the entity model 'LoanApplicationDraft' for persisting loan application draft data. It includes fields for user, status, JSON payload, and various timestamps, supporting multi-step wizard save workflows and audit logging.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraft
classes.description: Entity class representing a draft of a loan application with fields for user info, status, JSON data, risk assessment, and timestamps.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the draft.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the draft.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the user associated with the draft.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the user.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Retrieves the JSON payload representing the draft state.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Sets the JSON payload representing the draft state.

methods.name: getSectionStatus
methods.description: Retrieves the section status JSON mapping.

methods.name: setSectionStatus
methods.description: Sets the section status JSON mapping.

methods.name: getCurrentStep
methods.description: Returns the current step in the multi-step wizard.

methods.name: setCurrentStep
methods.description: Sets the current step.

methods.name: getStatus
methods.description: Returns the overall status of the draft.

methods.name: setStatus
methods.description: Sets the overall status.

methods.name: getRiskScore
methods.description: Returns the computed risk score, if available.

methods.name: setRiskScore
methods.description: Sets the risk score.

methods.name: getDecision
methods.description: Returns the automated decision outcome.

methods.name: setDecision
methods.description: Sets the decision outcome.

methods.name: getDecisionReason
methods.description: Returns the human-readable reason for the decision.

methods.name: setDecisionReason
methods.description: Sets the reason for the decision.

methods.name: getDecisionedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the risk engine evaluated the application.

methods.name: setDecisionedAt
methods.description: Sets the evaluation timestamp.

methods.name: getSubmittedAt
methods.description: Returns the submission timestamp after final submission.

methods.name: setSubmittedAt
methods.description: Sets the submission timestamp.

methods.name: getVersion
methods.description: Returns the optimistic concurrency control version.

methods.name: setVersion
methods.description: Sets the version.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the creation timestamp.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the creation timestamp.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the last updated timestamp.

methods.name: setUpdatedAt
methods.description: Sets the last updated timestamp.
